content:
With these adjustments, your materials will be much stronger. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

Grades:
• Cover Letter: 78/100
• Resume: 82/100

⸻

Letter for Ashley-Jade Eugene

Dear Ashley-Jade,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. I appreciate the time and effort you put into your application, and I have some feedback that will help refine your materials.

Your cover letter is well-written and maintains a professional tone. You do a great job of introducing yourself and explaining your qualifications, but one area where you could improve is making the letter more tailored to the specific role and company. Right now, the letter provides a strong general overview, but adding details about why you are drawn to this particular company would make it more compelling. Also, your closing paragraph could include a stronger call to action, such as requesting an interview.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 11 (chunk 11/22)
